ENSURE THAT THIS FUNCTION ALSO HANDLES SCENARIOS INVOLVING NEGATIVE NUMBERS. PLEASE WRITE THE ALGORITHM FOR THIS FUNCTION AND MAKE SURE IT IS OPTIMIZED TO AVOID REPEATED ELEMENTS. PROVIDE EXAMPLES DEMONSTRATING FUNCTION USAGE.

YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS.

*FUNCTION DESIGN*

<<FUNCTION DESIGN>>

THE FUNCTION WILL BE IMPLEMENTED USING A TWO-STEP APPROACH. FIRST, IT WILL IDENTIFY THE COMMON ELEMENTS BETWEEN THE TWO LISTS. SECOND, IT WILL SORT THE RESULTING LIST IN ASCENDING ORDER. TO AVOID REPEATED ELEMENTS, A SET WILL BE USED TO STORE THE UNIQUE VALUES. THE FUNCTION WILL HANDLE NEGATIVE NUMBERS BY CONVERTING THEM TO POSITIVE VALUES FOR COMPARISON PURPOSES.

*ALGORITHM*

<<ALGORITHM>>

1. INITI
